description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile yellow sports car with a sharply angled front, wide body, and aggressive aerodynamic features. The car features a prominent black rear spoiler, blacked-out windows, and distinctive black side graphics that accentuate its sporty character. The headlights are narrow and rectangular, while the taillights are round and set into a wide rear fascia. The wheels are black with a multi-spoke design, and the side mirrors are streamlined for minimal drag. The car's bodywork includes pronounced air intakes and sculpted lines, suggesting high performance and speed. Overall, the vehicle exudes a sense of luxury and power, typical of high-end exotic sports cars.
description: A yellow, low-slung sports car with a black rear spoiler, blacked-out windows, and bold side graphics, featuring aggressive aerodynamic styling and multi-spoke black wheels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply angled nose, narrow headlights, and wide stance with a visible hood vent and black windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the black side graphic, sculpted side skirts, black multi-spoke wheels, and the prominent rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black spoiler, dual round taillights on each side, wide rear bumper, and central exhaust outlets.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the black side graphic, sculpted bodywork, and black wheels, with the spoiler and rear details visible.
